title: Fix dashboard account lock to console smoke test

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating dashboard login/account context. Symptom: user lands in console smoke test account and cannot access expected reports. Checking env-driven account key wiring and account switch behavior.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented account-context based report scoping to avoid env-key lock-in. Updated AccountContext to persist last selected account id in localStorage and prefer that over env default on login. Replaced env-key account lookups with useAccount-selected account in report-configurations-dashboard, ReportConfigurationSelector, report-configuration-edit, and task-dispatch ReportConfigurationDialog. Validation: dashboard typecheck run completed successfully once during patch session; eslint invocation in this environment fails due local eslint/ajv tooling mismatch under current Node runtime.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted local runtime source of truth for GraphQL endpoint: root .env now activates Production Call Criteria PLEXUS_API_URL/API_KEY and comments out staging values. Verified active env host now matches dashboard/amplify_outputs.json host (7ubj23ym...us-west-2). Awaiting user restart confirmation.
